top_stories.title: Napocor deploys 5-MW gensets to resolve Catanduanes power disruption

(Napocor) switched on 5 megawatts (MW) of generator sets leased to the Marinawa Substation to temporarily solve the power supply disruption in Catanduanes. top_stories.title: Visayas grid on yellow alert again on June 12
top_stories.summary: MANILA, Philippines – The outages at three large coal power plants in the Visayas again prompted the National Grid Corp. of the Philippines to place the region under yellow alert on Friday.
